rationale: The skill walks the codebase to find architectural friction, so it reads broadly across project files plus the domain glossary (CONTEXT.md), ADRs in docs/adr/, and the bundled LANGUAGE.md/INTERFACE-DESIGN.md references. During the grilling loop it lazily creates or updates CONTEXT.md and may write new ADRs under docs/adr/. It does no network I/O and spawns no external binaries — exploration is delegated to the Explore subagent (in-process), and all side effects are local file edits.
